creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Charlie Li from comment #1)
Interestingly I could successfully build towncrier and py-sphinxcontrib-towncrier without any problems, after I updated the latter to 0.3.2a0.

So maybe that is a good workaround? I have no idea how you can rollback a port version while "pkg upgrade" keeps on working.
